response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song title "キラメキライダー☆" from on-screen text. Used "hololive IDOL PROJECT" as the primary artist. Identified "hololive 3rd Generation" as the performers. Searched for lyrics using the query "Kirameki Rider hololive lyrics". Segmented the video into vocal music sections and non-vocal dialogue/interaction sections. Added lyrics to the vocal music scenes.
response.global_summary: A live concert performance showcase featuring the song "Kirameki Rider☆" (キラメキライダー☆) by hololive 3rd Generation, interspersed with dialogue segments.

scenes.song_title: キラメキライダー☆ (Kirameki Rider☆)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
生まれたてのドキドキを響かせよう
最高の時間 最高の仲間と
キラメキに乗って☆ (イェーイ!)
覚えてるかな? 最初の歌 (懐かしいね)
私 声が震えていた (ほんの少し)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Let's let our freshly born heartbeats echo. The best time with the best friends, riding on the sparkle☆ (Yeah!). Do you remember? Our first song (It brings back memories), my voice was trembling (Just a little).
